clusters.title: Major police operation in NSW Hunter region
clusters.neutral_headline: Major police operation in NSW Hunter region

items.title: Major police operation in NSW Hunter region
items.standfirst: A major police operation is under way in the Hunter - with tactical police swarming the main street of Cessnock
items.content: A major police operation is under way in the Hunter - with tactical police swarming the main street of Cessnock

items.title: Major police operation unfolds in NSW Hunter region
items.standfirst: Witnesses spotted multiple police Bearcat vehicles around an apartment complex.
items.content: A major police operation is under way in the NSW Hunter region.Tactical police swarmed the main street of Cessnock, about 40 kilometres west of Newcastle, this afternoon.Witnesses first spotted multiple police Bearcat vehicles around an apartment complex near Cooper Street and North Avenue about 1pm.READ MORE: Pope hits back at Trump's extraordinary attackStreets were shut off as a perimeter was set up. Heavily armed officers were seen pointing their firearms towards the building before several entered and headed up to the top floor.NSW Police released a short statement confirming an operation was under way."There is no threat to the public," police said."Further information will be released at an operationally appropriate time."NEVER MISS A STORY: Get your breaking news and exclusive stories first by following us across all platforms.Download the 9NEWS App here via Apple and Google PlayMake 9News your preferred source on Google by ticking this box hereSign up to our breaking newsletter here
